nameMeanings.name: Harley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Harley (Shropshire, Yorkshire). The Shropshire placename derives from Old English hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Yorkshire placename derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ or hær + hlāw ‘mound, hill’, later replaced by lēah.

Irish (Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarghaile ‘descendant of Earghal’, a variant of the personal name Fearghal without the initial F-. This name has also become Herley and Hurley . Compare Arrell and Harrell .
Scottish (Fife): habitational name from any of several places called Harlaw in Midlothian, Peeblesshire, and Berwickshire, named in Older Scots with hare ‘gray’ + law ‘hill’.

variants.name: Herley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Art, Cormac.
Irish: variant of   Hurley  , probably via   Herlihy  .
English: variant of   Harley   or   Hurley  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Harley was born in April 1286, in Harley, Shropshire, England, his father, Richard de Harley, was 42 and his mother, Burga de Willey, was 42. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Joan de Corbet. He died on 16 May 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Harley est né en avril 1286, à Harley, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Harley, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Burga de Willey, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Joan de Corbet. Il est décédé le 16 mai 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Harley im April 1286 in Harley, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Harley 42 und seine Mutter Burga de Willey 42. Er hatte mit Joan de Corbet mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Mai 1349 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Harley è nato il nel aprile 1286 nel Harley, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Harley, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Burga de Willey, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Joan de Corbet. Morì il 16 maggio 1349, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Harley родился апрель 1286 г. в местности харли, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Harley было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Burga de Willey, 42. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Joan de Corbet. Он умер 16 мая 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Harley nació en abril de 1286, en Harley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Harley, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Burga de Willey, tenía 42 años.
